stories.headline: US House passes War Powers Resolution to end Trump's war in Iran

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: The Iran War Powers Resolution that I cosponsored (opposing the war) just passed the House of Representatives. The People’s House is sending a message: end this war.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: House votes 215-208 to end President Trump's war in Iran.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Trump’s illegal war in Iran has descended our world and our global economy into chaos. Yesterday, the House finally met the threshold to pass a War Powers Resolution. The Senate must work quickly to advance this resolution and end this war.

stories.headline: White House launches DOJ Model Cities Initiative to slash violent crime

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: President Donald J. Trump announces the next step in the administration’s successful war on crime: the Department of Justice’s Model Cities Initiative, designed to slash violent crime and RESTORE LAW AND ORDER in major cities across America. 🇺🇸

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Trump is sleeping again

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: 🚨TRUMP CAN’T LIFT HIS ARM? HOLY SHIT: Trump’s voice sounds unusually weak, he appears to be slurring some of his words, and he barely raises his right arm throughout the clip.

stories.headline: Trump appears to doze off during Oval Office announcement

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Sir, we have Trump disappointment syndrome. When you said no new wars, we took it to heart, and a few of us meant it.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Trump is now sitting back in his chair and dozing off

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: 🚨DONALD TRUMP HAS LOST CONSCIOUSNESS ON LIVE TV. He’s about to fall out of the chair. This is ridiculous.

stories.headline: Senate rejects SAVE America Act requiring voter ID and proof of citizenship

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: The Senate just killed the SAVE Act 48-50! Voter ID + proof of U.S. citizenship to register and vote, backed by 80%+ of Americans (including most Democrats), blocked again!

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🔥🚨 MAJOR JUST IN: The SAVE America Act Just Failed In The Senate. The measure, which would have required voter ID and proof of citizenship nationwide, was rejected 48-50.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: We are going to win back the House in November. Then forcefully stop Donald Trump and far-right extremists on the Supreme Court from rigging future elections.

stories.headline: Fidelity lowers minimum for SpaceX IPO access to $2,000.
stories.body: Fidelity has lowered the minimum account requirement for access to the SpaceX IPO from as much as $500,000 to just $2,000.

stories.headline: Capital markets fund AI buildout amid Bitcoin ETF outflows.
stories.body: Capital markets are funding the AI buildout at historic scale: ~$400B over 6 months. Bitcoin ETFs have seen ~$4B of outflows since May 14, pressuring $BTC. This is a capital rotation, not a Bitcoin impairment. Volatility creates opportunity.

stories.headline: NBA player Terry Rozier must forfeit $26M salary over gambling scheme
stories.body: NBA free agent Terry Rozier must forfeit most of his $26.6 million salary for the 2025-2026 season due to his alleged role in a sports gambling scheme, an arbitrator rules.

stories.headline: First case of flesh-eating New World screwworm detected in US livestock in decades in South Texas.
stories.body: A case of flesh-eating New World screwworm has been detected in South Texas, the US Department of Agriculture said. It is the first time this parasitic fly – whose larvae feed exclusively on the tissue of warm-blooded animals – has been detected in US livestock in decades.

stories.headline: Anthropic urges global pause in AI development over self-improvement risks
stories.body: Anthropic is calling for top AI labs to weigh slowing the pace of development, suggesting that AI systems are advancing so rapidly that they may soon be able to improve themselves without human intervention in ways that could pose societal risks. https://www.wsj.com/tech/ai/anthropic-urges-global-pause-in-ai-development-flags-self-improvement-risk-99cefb73?mod=e2tw

stories.headline: Explanation of slang terms involving "cooked".
stories.body: Jfyi, "cooked" benchmarks means that they are benchmaxxed. Accountants "cook" books to dodge taxes. "Absolutely cooking" benchmarks means they are great as in "now we're cooking with gas" etc. "Absolutely cooked" also means that something is done for, meaning all hope is lost.

stories.headline: Police paying for DEI roles despite claims it does not exist in UK.
stories.body:
“D.E.I. DOESN’T EXIST IN THE UK!

POLICE DOCUMENTS NEVER MENTION D.E.I.!

IT’S A FAR-RIGHT CONSPIRACY THEORY!”

Then why are police forces paying staff over half a million quid in wages for something that doesn’t exist?
